title: Workers API
excerpt: description: Use R2 from Cloudflare Workers with the Workers API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/) let you run code at the edge. When you bind an R2 bucket to a Worker, you can read and write objects directly using the [Workers API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/api/workers/workers-api-usage/). A bucket stores your objects in R2\. To create a new R2 bucket:
